introSection: Family Roller Coaster is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned and travelled by UK showman Nathan Hart. The coaster also goes by the name Brucomela.
fullText: Family Roller Coaster is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned and travelled by UK showman Nathan Hart. The coaster also goes by the name Brucomela.
